Description.text: Avid Organics manufactures specialty chemicals for pharmaceutical, personal care, nutraceutical, agrochemical, and industrial markets. Sustainability is built into how we source, produce, and report. Our framework spans environmental performance, occupational health and safety, social accountability, and ethical governance across our supply chain.

RenewableEnergy.title:
100% Renewable 
 Energy Operations
RenewableEnergy.subtitle: Setting a New Standard in Sustainable Manufacturing
RenewableEnergy.description: In 2025, Avid Organics planted 5,080 native trees near its Vadodara facility using the Miyawaki method. Each planting is maintained for four years to ensure sustained ecological benefit, supporting local biodiversity and improving air quality in the surrounding area.

SustainabilityFramework.title: Our Sustainability Framework
SustainabilityFramework.subtitle: Structured for Impact. Measured for Accountability.
SustainabilityFramework.description: Avid Organics' sustainability strategy aligns with leading ESG standards, including GRI, SASB, and the UN Sustainable Development Goals. Our approach is built around three core pillars:

title: Environmental
Stewardship
items.description: Reducing our environmental footprint through renewable energy, resource efficiency, and innovation in green chemistry.

title: Social
Responsibility
items.description: Protecting our people, promoting safety, and contributing positively to the communities where we operate.

title: Governance
& Ethics
items.description: Maintaining integrity, transparency, and compliance across every level of our organization.

features.title: Green Chemistry by Design
features.desc: Our R&D teams apply green chemistry principles to every stage of production, improving process efficiency, reducing waste, and minimizing the use of hazardous materials.

features.title: Water & Waste Management
features.desc: Our Vadodara facility operates with zero liquid discharge (ZLD) through advanced wastewater treatment, including multiple-effect evaporators. Since 2018, per-unit waste generation has decreased by 27%, alongside increasing production volumes.

features.title: Renewable Energy Leadership
features.desc: By transitioning to 100% renewable electricity, we have eliminated Scope 2 emissions and strengthened our overall carbon performance.

features.title: Carbon Reduction Roadmap
features.desc: Since 2018, we have achieved a 22% reduction in GHG emissions intensity through efficiency improvements and renewable energy adoption.

reporting.iso: Environmental management systems certified to ISO 14001:2015
reporting.commitment: reinforce our commitment to continuous improvement and compliance.

ethical.title: Ethical Standards
ethical.description: Avid Organics upholds a strict no animal testing policy and employs validated alternative testing methodologies across all product safety assessments.

health_safety.title: Employee Health & Safety
health_safety.description: We maintain compliance with ISO 45001:2018 and operate a proactive safety culture driven by training, risk identification, and continuous improvement. Our strong safety record reflects the effectiveness of this approach.

community.title: Community Engagement
community.description: We invest in initiatives that deliver long-term value to society, including:

list.2: Local employment and skill development programs

miyawaki.title: Miyawaki Forest Initiative
miyawaki.description_part2: native trees across two years using the Miyawaki method, including 5,080 in 2025. Each planting is maintained for four years to ensure sustained ecological benefit, supporting local biodiversity and air quality near our Vadodara operations.

Governance.title: Governance & Product Stewardship
Governance.certifications_desc: Avid Organics' operations meet globally recognized standards of quality, safety, and ethical management:
